series_description: Employee organization registration reports, Constitution and Bylaws.
retention_statement: Paper: Retained by Board Office permanent- ly or until superceded, replaced

series_description: Questionnaire sent to employers requesting specific information (i.e. number of permanent employees on payroll, contact persons, negotiated contracts and related information for jurisdiction).
retention_statement: Paper: Retain by agency until updated ; Electronic: Retained by agency for two years

series_description: Computer information relative to the Clearinghouse Database and the corresponding labor contracts, addendums, fact-finding reports, conciliation awards, and other documents that it contains. Provides efficient means of tracking, reporting and maintaining information. Summary of major points of agreement reached between the public employer and the union covering employees.
retention_statement: Electronic: Data extracted from Labor Contracts (Collective Bargaining Agreements) and Addendums are stored in the Clearinghouse Database. Beginning in 2012, data extracted from Fact-Finding Reports and Conciliation Awards are stored in the Clearinghouse Database along with a PDF copy of the document. Beginning in 1995 information regarding Labor Contracts and Addendums are scanned electronically. Current contract and addendum information are available on SERB's website. ; Paper: Paper copy of Labor Contracts, Addendums, Contract Data Summary Sheets, Fact-Finding Reports, Conciliation Awards, Fact-Finding/Conciliation Data Summary Sheets and Annual Employer Information Reports ; Microform: Prior to 1995 Contract/Collective Bargaining agreement information is stored on microfilm.
disposition: Electronic: Permanent ; Paper: Wastepaper ; Microform: Permanent

series_description: Daily outline of new cases filed is kept electronically and published on the SERB web site.
retention_statement: Electronic: Permanent Retention

series_description: Tally sheet of votes submitted during elections for decertification of employee organizations, determination of exclusive employee organizations, self-determination elections.
retention_statement: Paper: Retained with the case file for 1 year and 45 days after Board date . Destroyed when case is closed. ; Electronic: Scanned as part of the case file.

series_description: Official documents including the records of proceedings before the State Employment Relations Board relating to the SERB cases appealed to the Common Pleas Court.
retention_statement: Electronic: Documents are scanned as part of the case file ERB-01. Retain permanently. ; Paper: Retain for one year after closing of Court Case

series_description: Includes marked ballots, ballot proofs, secret ballot envelopes, all of which are used in elections conducted by agency.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain by agency for ninety (90) days from the date Board certifies election results.

series_description: Reports submitted by employee organizations as required by law, outlining affiliations, officers, revenues, and financial information.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain documents for seven (7) years due to public inquiry and statistical data. ; Paper: Paper copies are converted to electronic format. Once paper document has been converted it may be destroyed. Retain electronic format for seven (7) years due to public inquires and statistical data.

series_description: State contracts, DAS Directives, Catalogues, warranties, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: Retained by Board Office until superceded, obsolete, or replaced ; Electronic: Retained by Board Office until superceded, obsolete, or replaced

series_description: Office Procedure manuals
retention_statement: Paper: Retained by Board Office until superseded, obsolete, or replaced ; Electronic: Retained by Board Office until superseded, obsolete, or replaced

series_description: Collective Bargaining Agreements between employer and employee organizations.
retention_statement: Microform: In 2016, microform prior to 1995 was converted to electronic format. Converted electronic format is retained permanently, the microform may be destroyed. ; Paper: All CBA''s submitted in paper format will be converted to electronic format. Once converted and saved into the Clearinghouse Database, paper copies may be destroyed. Electronic copy is retained permanently. ; Electronic: Since 1995 CBA''s are scanned and electronic copy is retained permanently. Electronic copy of current contract is available on SERB website.
disposition: Microform: Trash ; Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Permanent

series_description: Responses to survey questions used to compile Annual Report on the Cost of Health Insurance in Ohio''s Public Sector. Survey is conducted annually using electronic and paper formats. Information includes employer insurance information and plan data.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for five (5) years after publication of report, and ; Paper: Convert to electronic format. Once converted paper copy may be destroyed. Retain electronic format for five (5) years and

series_description: Includes: internal correspondence (memos, emails, letters from state employees); correspondence from external parties including individuals and organizations seeking information pertaining to the board, it''''s laws, rules, and policies; and, other miscellaneous inquires. This correspondence is informative (it does not attempt to influence agency policy).
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain six (6) months and Similar to General Schedule: GAR-CM-02. ; Paper: Retain six (6) months and Similar to General Schedule: GAR-CM-02.

series_description: All informal communications which convey information of temporary importance in lieu of oral communication including telephone voicemail, chats, posts, instant, and text-messages, post-it notes, drafts, generic emails, social media posts, and shared departmental calendars. These communications have very little administrative value as they do not set policy, establish guidelines, define procedures, certify a transaction, or become a receipt.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value, and ; Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value, and

series_description: Correspondence authorized by the board's executive director or a member of the board dealing with significant aspects of the administration of the agency. Correspondence includes all written memoranda, letters, and position papers whether on paper or in electronic format.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain two (2) years post expiration of board member or executive director''s service, and ; Paper: Retain two (2) years post expiration of board member or executive director''s service, and

series_description: Files containing information relative to specific petitions or requests submitted to the agency. Information includes, initial petitions, correspondence to and from parties, investigation materials, requests for information, and case disposition information.
retention_statement: Electronic: Unfair Labor Practice (ULP) Case documents will be destroyed one (1) year and forty-five (45) days for the date of case closure. The only documents excluded from are the ULP initial charge, the Investigator''s Memorandum, and the Board Directive; they are maintained permanently by the agency. ULP Case audio files, cases with probable cause findings, or board opinions are retained permanently due to public inquiries and statistical data. Representation (REP) cases are retained permanently due to public inquires and statistical data. Mediation (MED) cases will be destroyed one (1) year and forty-five (45) days from the date of case closure. MED case Notice to Negotiate, Fact Finding Reports, Conciliation Awards, Board Directives, and Board Opinions are retained permanently due to public inquiries and statistical data. ULP, MED, REP cases appealed to reviewing court are retained permanently due to public inquiries and statistical data. ; Paper: Entire file is retained for one (1) year and forty-five (45) days after case closure ; Microform: ULP cases dating back further than 1995, destroyed in 2016.
disposition: Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Wastepaper ; Microform: Trash Destruction

series_description: General/Misc. correspondence to and from the Board.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for six (6) months from the date of receipt and ; Electronic: Retain for six (6) months from the date of receipt and

series_description: Appeals filed or requests for investigations filed with PBR, pursuant to O.R.C. 124 & 4167.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for two (2) years and three (3) months after the last known action ; Electronic: Retain for two (2) years and three (3) months after the last known action

series_description: Copies of Civil Service Commission (CSC) Annual Reports, administrative rules, and city charters for municipalities.
retention_statement: Paper: Paper destroyed after digitized. ; Electronic: Retain Annual Reports for the two most recently filed years. Retain administrative rules and city charters until superseded.

series_title: Journals of the State Personnel Board of Review
series_description: Original Board Orders, Resolutions, and Opinions of the Board
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for two (2) years

series_description: Research Requests, Logs, & Public Records
retention_statement: Electronic: Clearinghouse Research Requests and associated public records requests are stored in the Clearinghouse Database.

series_description: Clearinghouse Contract Data Summary Sheets
retention_statement: Electronic: Contract Data Summary Sheet (CDSS) and Fact-Finding/Conciliation Data Summary Sheet are stored in the Clearinghouse Database.

series_description: Clearinghouse Database System Generated Logs.
retention_statement: Electronic: Clearinghouse Database System Generated Logs.
